usage: report_power_rail_results [-help] [{-region {x1 y1 x2 y2} | -rlrp_inst {instance_name} | -plot {none ir tc rc rj jpeak jrms unc ivdn ivdd ipc ipceiv isweiv effr thermal tile_thermal cvi1 pi pv pix tot vu ibu vc ibc er rlrp res rv_rms rv_peak rv_avg ivde ip ip_i ip_s ip_l ipd ipd_i ipd_s ipd_t ipd_l ip_clk ip_tr freq slack activity td cap load dd node_effr icm tpd ptpd fit sem_jrms sem_javg sem_jpeak rv_sem_jrms rv_sem_javg sem_ddt rv_sem_mavg rv_sem_jpeak rv_sem_jlpeak rv_sem_jspeak unc_inst unc_pinnodes lunc_inst}} [-nets {all, all_power, all_ground...}] [-filename <filename>]] [-filename <filename> [-append ]] [-plot {none ir tc rc rj jpeak jrms unc ivdn ivdd ipc ipceiv isweiv effr thermal tile_thermal cvi1 pi pv pix tot vu ibu vc ibc er rlrp res rv_rms rv_peak rv_avg ivde ip ip_i ip_s ip_l ipd ipd_i ipd_s ipd_t ipd_l ip_clk ip_tr freq slack activity td cap load dd node_effr icm tpd ptpd fit sem_jrms sem_javg sem_jpeak rv_sem_jrms rv_sem_javg sem_ddt rv_sem_mavg rv_sem_jpeak rv_sem_jlpeak rv_sem_jspeak unc_inst unc_pinnodes lunc_inst} [-layers {all, M1, M2...}] [-range_min <min>] [-range_max <max>] [-filter_min <filter_min>] [-filter_max <filter_max>] [-limit <#_lines>] [-ignore_limit_bound ] [-enable_filter_summary ]]

options.name: -enable_filter_summary
options.description: use the filtered results to form the summary

options.name: -filter_max
options.description: specifies the max value of color scale filter.

options.name: -filter_min
options.description: specifies the min value of color scale filter.

options.name: -ignore_limit_bound
options.description: ignore the upper bound of limit

options.name: -limit
options.description: _lines> # Dump first number violations into report file.

options.name: -plot
options.description: {none ir tc rc rj jpeak jrms unc ivdn ivdd ipc ipceiv isweiv effr thermal tile_thermal cvi1 pi pv pix tot vu ibu vc ibc er rlrp res rv_rms rv_peak rv_avg ivde ip ip_i ip_s ip_l ipd ipd_i ipd_s ipd_t ipd_l ip_clk ip_tr freq slack activity td cap load dd node_effr icm tpd ptpd fit sem_jrms sem_javg sem_jpeak rv_sem_jrms rv_sem_javg sem_ddt rv_sem_mavg rv_sem_jpeak rv_sem_jlpeak rv_sem_jspeak unc_inst unc_pinnodes lunc_inst} none - Clear ir - IRdrop tc - Tap Current rc - Resistor Current rj - Iavg/Ilimit jpeak - Ipeak/Ilimit jrms - Irms/Ilimit sem_fit - Failure In Time sem_rms - RMS Current Over sem_avg - AVG Current sem_peak - PEAK Current sem_ddt - Detailed Delta Tempertaure rv_sem_rms - RV RMS Current rv_sem_avg - RV AVG Current rv_sem_mavg - RV MAX AVG Current rv_sem_peak - RV PEAK Current unc - unconnected power-grid sections ivdn - net based voltage drop ivdd - domain based drop ipc - instance peak current ipceiv - EIV Window instance peak current isweiv -EIV Window instance switch status effr - effective resistance thermal - Instance thermal tile_thermal - Tile Thermal cvi1 - Customized file 1 pi - power-gate current I/Idsat pv - power-gate voltage drop pix - power-gate current tot - turn-on time vu - voltage drop across package ibu - inter die bump vu er - electromigration risk rlrp - instance resistance of LRP res - Grid Resistance rv_rms - RV RMS rv_peak - RV PEAK rv_avg - RV AVG ivde - Instance voltage drop in ESD ip - instance total power ip_i - instance internal power ip_s - instance switching power ip_l - instance leakage power ipd - instance total power density ipd_i - instance internal power density ipd_s - instance switching power density ipd_t - instance total power density ipd_l - instance leakage power density freq - fastest frequency domain for instance ip_tr - instance toggle rate slack - worst slack for instance activity - instance activity td - transition density for instance cap - power-grid capacitance load - output loading capacitance for instance dd - decap density node_effr - node based reff icm - instance current movie tpd - tile power density ptpd - profiling tile power density fit - failures in time sem_jrms - RMS I/Ilimit sem_javg - AVG I/Ilimit sem_jpeak - PEAK I/Ilimit rv_sem_jrms - RV RMS I/Ilimit rv_sem_javg - RV AVG I/Ilimit rv_sem_jpeak - RV PEAK I/Ilimit rv_sem_jlpeak - RV Long PEAK I/Ilimit rv_sem_jspeak - RV Short PEAK I/Ilimit unc_inst - Unconnected Inst Pins unc_pinnodes - Unconnected/WeaklyConnected Pin Nodes lunc_inst - Logically Unconnected Inst

options.name: -range_max
options.description: specifies the max value of color scale.

options.name: -range_min
options.description: specifies the max value of color scale.

options.name: -region
options.description: measure the data in specified XY location. Reserved and no implementation yet.

options.name: -rlrp_inst
options.description: instance name for reporting rlrp path. Reserved and no implementation yet
